name: Royal Zucchini Paremesan
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp corn oil (or olive, or canola)
1 10-oz can Rotel tomatoes with green chilies (or other spicy brand)
4 medium zucchini, sliced crosswise 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground turkey and onion in oil until meat is crumbly.
2. Add Rotel tomatoes, tomato sauce, and paste; stir occasionally for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in green pepper, oregano, salt, black pepper, and garlic salt.
4. Add zucchini; simmer another 10 minutes.
5. Transfer mixture to a shallow ungreased 3-quart casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
Makes: 6 servings
Contains 265 calories per serving. According to HCF exchanges, each serving is 3/2 meat, 2-1/2 vegetables, 1/2 fat.
